steps.title: Test the sign pattern
steps.content: The inequality is $4x-8y>16$. In the region where $x<0$ and $y>0$, the term $4x$ is negative and the term $-8y$ is also negative.

steps.title: Show it cannot work
steps.content:
In that region, $4x-8y$ is always negative. A negative value cannot be greater than $16$, so the region contains no solution points.
The answer is A.
